reviews.review_description:
The puzzles are very approachable and the overall atmosphere is very relaxed.

No timers, no pressure, just a nice experience overall.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We are glad that you are enjoying Fractured.

reviews.review_description: Excellent usage of the pass-through capabilities of Quest 3 creating the fun experience of assembling broken 3D objects in the comfort of your preferred place around the house. Controls are simple and intuitive as you would expect from an MR game. Music is relaxing and it gets you in the proper mood. An interesting feature is the fact that the pieces float around, sometimes it adds a bit to the challenge when you are looking for a particular piece around the room :).   Looking forward for more objects to be added in the future so we can enjoy the experience of reassembling them.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_description: Finished all of the puzzles in all difficulties in about a week and now I've bought the new Japan themed DLC as well. This one is a bit tougher than the first batch and I'm up for the challenge. 15 puzzles x 3 difficulty levels for 4.99$ is a steal!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured, as well as the extra puzzles! 😊

reviews.review_description: The game has you piecing together 3D objects, the models are super cool, and with three levels of difficulty, it keeps things interesting. Definitely worth checking out if you're into puzzles or just want something new to play!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_description: A relaxing experience with a soothing soundtrack that perfectly complements the assembly process. The variety of puzzles, each with three levels of difficulty, always provides a new challenge. Perfect for a cozy yet occasionally intense gaming experience

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome review, andrei! 
We've got more games that you can try on our official Discord here https://discord.gg/UFMkmTCZWN You can connect with other players or share your suggestions on our games. 
Thank you for  your support!

reviews.review_description: Was fun putting the pieces together, but I play sitting and when the pieces float around towards the back of me I have to wait for them to show up again to use.

reviews.review_title: Fun 3D puzzle game in mixed reality!
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed both a relaxing and more frenzied  approach piecing the puzzles together. On the relax side it was just that, chill and fun. On the faster moving side I enjoyed trying to find techniques to reduce the time it took me to complete a puzzle.

developer_response.body:
Hey Dave! 

That's a great review! Thanks so much. 
Our team is working on adding new features so keep an eye on our page for news. If you'd like to stay up to date with all our release and updates or if you'd like to be part of our community we would love to have you on our official Discord server. You can jump in here: https://discord.gg/UFMkmTCZWN 
Take care!

reviews.review_description:
I love cozy games, where you can just be in your world and do something fun. Fractured is exactly that: a cozy game that can become a little intense when you play on hard. 

I also love that I'm not disconnected from the world around me when I play. I can talk to my wife, I avoid stepping on the dog... you know, the usual... 😆

And I looove the Earth globe!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_description: I like to play sitting down. Reaching the pieces is cumbersome. You need to make it so we can point at a piece and bring it your hand with the trigger. Also moving in the space similar to puzzle places would be much better. Also if you shrink the pieces it allows it to shrink to the point it disappears.

developer_response.body: Hey! We've modified the gameplay so that pieces now float in front of you and you can pull them with the grab button. Let us know what you think!

reviews.review_description: it's exactly what i needed to relax and the music fits perfectly! The 3D puzzles pose a real challenge

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_title: Serene feel but with challenging puzzles
reviews.review_description: It’s so relaxing to assemble the 3D puzzles and the music contributes to the chill atmosphere of the game. It kind of reminds me of the Japanese art of Kintsugi, where you repair broken objects by glueing them back together with gold.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words! Kintsugi is a really good comparison here!

We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Simple but not simple. Putting back together that smashed vase is not as easy as it looks.
Well done developers.

developer_response.body:
Hi Goldenlay,
Thank you for the 5-star review! We're thrilled you enjoyed Fractured: Mixed Reality 3D Puzzle.
Join our Discord for updates and community fun: https://discord.gg/UFMkmTCZWN 
Take care!

reviews.review_description:
The graphics are very well done. I enjoyed the mixed reality aspect .
The music was calming and added to the experience. I loved the options for difficulty and being able to enlarge or shrink the puzzle . Would highly recommend.

reviews.review_description:
1. Puzzle models are not beautiful/rewarding enough. They should be more appealing/intricate enough to motivate players to feel motivated and rewarded for completing difficult puzzles.

2. Only few limited number of puzzle models available and doesn't justify the price tag.

3. Lack 50 and 100 pieces option

developer_response.body:
Hello meta_voyager,

Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience with Fractured: Mixed Reality 3D Puzzle didn't meet your expectations. Our team is always striving to improve, and your comments are invaluable in helping us do so.

We’d love to hear more about what didn't work for you. Please join our Discord server to share your thoughts and connect with our community: https://discord.gg/UFMkmTCZWN.

Thank you for giving us a try.

reviews.review_description: Buena demo!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_title: A good start that might end up great
reviews.review_description: This is a simple, fun game. It get 4 stars because of some minor graphic glitches and it's not quite a 5 star type of game. I wish I could pick up an item and throw it to the ground myself to break it.

reviews.review_description:
I had the pleasure of diving into Fractured 3D Puzzle in mixed reality, and I must say, it’s quite an impressive experience on the Meta Quest 3. The passthrough mode works exceptionally well, providing a seamless blend of virtual and real-world elements, making it a truly immersive experience.
 
The tutorial is incredibly helpful, guiding you into the game quickly and effortlessly. However, there’s a minor typo where "excellent" is spelled incorrectly. It's a small detail, but worth fixing for a polished experience.
 
Navigating through the game is straightforward and user-friendly. I particularly appreciate the feature that allows you to adjust the puzzle difficulty between easy, medium, and hard with ease. The design is visually appealing, and the way the pieces float around you in a circular fashion is quite clever. It creates an engaging environment that keeps you hooked.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your 5-star review, Parfunkel!
We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed Fractured. Your positive feedback means a lot to us.
We’d love for you to join our Discord community to stay close to the game’s development and connect with other players and share your suggestions directly with our devs. Here’s the invite: Discord Invite: https://discord.gg/UFMkmTCZWN 
Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: It's a very relaxing game to sit and put together 3D models.  I tried some of harder ones and they were pretty challenging.  Definitely recommend to those who like puzzles.

developer_response.body:
Hi jthiesse,

Thank you for the 5-star review! We're thrilled you enjoyed Fractured: Mixed Reality 3D Puzzle.

Join our Discord for updates and community fun: https://discord.gg/UFMkmTCZWN

reviews.review_description:
Fractured is super fun and relaxing to play. 
Choose your favourite place around the house to sit, watch as the objects get smashed to bits and try putting them back together. The object variety is pretty good and joining the bits is super satisfying. 
The music is also soothing for the play style and adds to the overall atmosphere. 
Just play it!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Fractured! 😊

reviews.review_description:
This is a good game to just sit and escape while putting together the 3d objects of your choice. 

I'm looking forward to a larger selection, though the available puzzles have three levels of difficulty, so it extends the play time quite a lot.
